items.br: Extrai registros de cidadania de colaboradores com status e business group. Suporta compliance de direito ao trabalho e gestao de workforce global.
items.en: Extracts employee citizenship records with status and business group. Supports right-to-work compliance and global workforce management.
items.es: Extrae registros de ciudadanía de colaboradores con status y business group. Soporta compliance de derecho al trabajo y gestión de workforce global.
